title: aws-ssm: put() UTF-8 error uses Backend instead of DecodeFailed
description: put() calls std::str::from_utf8() and maps failure to SecretError::Backend{backend:'aws-ssm', source:'SSM parameter values must be valid UTF-8'}. This is wrong: Backend signals a transient failure callers may retry; DecodeFailed signals a permanent caller-side error. Trigger: caller passes a non-UTF-8 SecretValue to put(). Bad behavior: caller may retry indefinitely on a permanent encoding error.
